name: tsp-site
description: TSP — Trust Standard Protocol. Open specification and public site for cryptographically verifiable AI provenance.

scripts.build:sdk: tsup packages/lexitsp-sdk/src/index.ts packages/lexitsp-sdk/src/node/index.ts packages/lexitsp-sdk/src/types.ts packages/lexitsp-sdk/src/v3/index.ts packages/lexitsp-sdk/src/v3/admin/index.ts packages/lexitsp-sdk/src/v3/cli/index.ts --format esm --dts --out-dir packages/lexitsp-sdk/dist --clean --tsconfig packages/lexitsp-sdk/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:trustbadge: tsup packages/trustbadge-react/src/index.ts --format esm --dts --out-dir packages/trustbadge-react/dist --clean --external react --external react-dom --external @lexitsp/sdk --tsconfig packages/trustbadge-react/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:packages: bun run build:sdk && bun run build:trustbadge
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run test:all
scripts.test:all: bun run test:sdk && bun run test:trustbadge
scripts.check:release: bun run check && bun run check:claims && bun run check:manifest && bun run check:strategy && bun run check:public-surface && bun run check:interop && bun run smoke:packages && bun run smoke:production-start
